## Vote

- **Proposal reference:** #[issue_number]
- **Vote:** approve / reject / abstain
- **Stakeholder type:** HUMAN / AI / INDEPENDENT_AUDITOR / INSTITUTION
- **Weight:** [0.0–1.0]

## Justification

[Reason for this vote]

## Verification

- [ ] I have reviewed the CCP simulation results
- [ ] I have considered the adversarial test outcomes
- [ ] My vote is independent (no conflict of interest)

---

_Votes are tallied by the governance bot. Threshold: 0.75._
